notes: The default adapter loads Qwen/Qwen3-1.7B directly from the local Hugging Face cache with transformers and local_files_only=true.
Set LOCAL_QWEN_PROVIDER=local_vllm to use a local Qwen served through vLLM or another compatible chat-completions server.
It intentionally does not read API-key environment variables. If a remote Modal Qwen endpoint is wired later, add a setting-specific config field and validator update before use.
Live provider probing is optional; default validation only checks config and request construction.
